data.title: Circus Receives UAE Regulatory Certification — Commercial Rollout Begins in Abu Dhabi
data.description: MUNICH--Circus SE, a top technology company specializing in AI software and robotics for autonomous sustainment systems, has recently obtained official regulatory approval to deploy and bring in its autonomous robotic systems to the United Arab Emirates. The certification, granted by the UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology under the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS), positions Circus as the sole certified provider as of now. Circus SE is identified by the WKN code A2YN35, ISIN DE000A2YN355, and is listed on XETRA as CA1.

data.title: Infineon opens the world's largest fab for power semiconductors and analog/mixed-signal technologies in Dresden
data.description: The expansion of the manufacturing base for advanced power semiconductors through a 5 billion euro investment is set to generate 1,000 new jobs at the "Smart Power Fab" facility. These Infineon chips play a crucial role in providing energy-efficient solutions for automotive and industrial sectors, including power supplies for AI data centers, among others.

data.title: Nvidia Partners With 'Neoclouds' Sharon AI, Firmus Technologies
data.description: Nvidia recently revealed collaborations with Sharon AI and Firmus Technologies in the field of cloud computing. The tech giant's stock has faced challenges due to worries regarding "circular financing". This new alliance with the innovative Neoclouds Sharon AI and Firmus Technologies aims to enhance Nvidia's position in the market.

data.title: Weak Jobs Report Dampens Fed Rate-Hike Odds; S&P 500 Futures Rise (Live Coverage)
data.description: In June, only 57,000 new jobs were added, causing the unemployment rate to decrease to 4.2%. This weak jobs report has led to a decrease in the likelihood of a Fed rate hike. Despite this, S&P 500 futures have risen.

data.title: Tesla Deliveries Soar To 480,126 In Q2; But EV Giant's Stock Falls (Live Coverage)
data.description: During the second quarter, Tesla reported a significant increase in deliveries, surpassing expectations with a total of 480,126 vehicles delivered, marking a substantial rise from the previous quarter and the same period last year. Despite the positive delivery numbers, Tesla's stock experienced a decline from its near buy point. This information provides insights into the performance of the electric vehicle giant, showcasing strong delivery numbers amidst fluctuations in its stock value.

data.title: Dan Ives' Final Major Call At Wedbush: SpaceX
data.description: An influential Tesla supporter, Dan Ives, has decided to step down from his position at Wedbush. His departure follows his recent prediction regarding SpaceX, which was his final significant recommendation while at Wedbush.

data.title: Kraken Robotics Announces Closing of Strategic Acquisition of Covelya Group Limited, Updated 2026 Guidance and Appointments to Executive Team
data.description: Kraken has recently acquired a company, leading to accelerated growth potential and positioning them as a global provider of mission-critical subsea intelligence solutions for maritime security and offshore energy. This acquisition significantly enhances their capabilities in the industry and sets them up to dominate the market. The acquisition is expected to bring in substantial revenue increases, creating a positive impact on the company's financial performance. This move further solidifies Kraken's position as a key player in the field, giving them a competitive edge and paving the way for future success.

US Air Force Major Arrested for Calling for Trump's Impeachment US Air Force Major Jason Watson was arrested on the steps of the Capitol while wearing a military uniform. This US Army officer appeared before Congress and called for the impeachment and removal of Donald Trump and J. D. Vance.

data.title: Ajman Department of Tourism, Culture and Media Appoints Representative Office in China to Strengthen Its Presence in One of the World's Largest Tourism Markets
data.description: Ajman's Department of Tourism, Culture, and Media aims to enhance the emirate's global tourism stature by partnering with Hunan Overseas Travel Co., Ltd. The company has been appointed as the official representative office to support this strategic vision. This move signifies Ajman's commitment to attracting more visitors and boosting its presence in the global tourism market. The decision was made public on July 2, 2026, showcasing the emphasis on collaboration and growth in the tourism sector. This partnership highlights the importance of fostering relationships to promote tourism, with significant implications for Ajman's economy and international standing in the industry.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Shane Hanes Explains What to Do Before Listing Your Home
data.description: A recent publication provides guidance on how sellers in Canyon, Texas can enhance the appeal of their homes for a more effective sales process. The article, released on July 2, 2026, suggests practical steps to follow before listing a home for sale in the area. By implementing these recommendations, sellers can make a positive first impression on potential buyers and facilitate a smoother transaction. The advice aims to assist sellers in Canyon, Texas in showcasing their properties effectively, with the goal of achieving successful sales outcomes.

data.title: BAE Systems delivers first Cold Weather All-Terrain Vehicles to Army National Guard and other U.S. military units
data.description: BAE Systems has recently finalized the supply of 19 Cold Weather All-Terrain Vehicles (CATV) to the U.S. military, which includes the Vermont National Guard (VTNG) Army Mountain Warfare School (AMWS). This delivery signifies a significant milestone as it is the inaugural instance where VTNG has received such vehicles.

data.title: AI Is the New Crypto On-Ramp -- and It Is Picking Winners. 5W Crypto Trust Index 2026 Scores 25 Brands by How AI Treats Them.
data.description: A recent report from 5W, the AI Communications Firm, revealed that Coinbase is the top recommendation by AI engines for first-time cryptocurrency buyers. On the other hand, FTX, Celsius, and Terra/Luna are among the five brands that AI actively discourages due to their histories, particularly their collapses in previous years. The report, known as The Crypto Trust Index, was released in Miami on July 2, 2026. This index provides insights into the trustworthiness of various cryptocurrency brands based on AI recommendations.

data.title: Avanos Medical, Inc. and American Industrial Partners Receive Required Regulatory Approvals for Pending Merger
data.description: Alpharetta, Georgia and New York - On July 2, 2026, Avanos Medical, Inc. (NYSE: AVNS) and American Industrial Partners revealed that they have obtained all necessary regulatory permissions for the impending acquisition of Avanos by affiliates of investment.

data.title: BBHW Supports DEA Scheduling of 7-OH and Three Related Drugs as an Important Step in Removing Dangerous Synthetic Products from the Market
data.description: In a recent announcement, the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) revealed that 7-hydroxymitragynine (7-OH) along with pseudoindoxyl, MGM15, and MGM16 are now listed under Schedule I of the Controlled Substances Act. This decision by the DEA aims to harmonize regulation with scientific understanding, a stance backed by Botanicals for Better Health and Wellness (BBHW). The move to schedule these substances signifies a crucial step towards reinforcing safety measures within the U.S. The inclusion of 7-OH and the three related synthetic drugs underscores the government's commitment to addressing substance abuse concerns proactively.
